falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 2022 May Luna high (specific resistance level) by 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A breakout above this key level would invalidate the blowoff scenario, suggesting continued bullish momentum rather than a topping pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume remains below 50% of the 30-day average during the 14-day window
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Inadequate volume would contradict the blowoff pattern's requirement for extreme participation, indicating a lack of conviction in the move.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-period RSI stays above 70 for the entire 14-day period
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Persistent overbought conditions without a corrective decline would refute the blowoff top narrative, implying sustained bullish pressure.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
